description: An individual received a Form 1099-MISC for freelance work and needs to report it on their tax return.

nodes.task_description: Enter the nonemployee compensation from Form 1099-MISC as gross receipts on Schedule C.
Calculate and deduct any related business expenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters valid business expenses to reduce net income.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the self-employment tax due on the net profit using Schedule SE.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the self-employment tax.
